MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 43 

COMMENT: The first character of the contract ID is a letter that indicates the type of plan. If the beneficiary did not 
have a Part D plan for a given month, this variable will have a value of N, 0, or be null/missing for that 
month. If the beneficiary changed plans during the year, the value indicates the final, reconciled 
contract number. For 2006–2012, this
